tools.name: search_family_story_content
tools.description: Main entry point. Natural-language search across the Oral Heritage Index corpus. Use for any question about interviewing relatives, recording methods, preserving artifacts, end-of-life capture, gifting occasions, publishing family books, or digital legacy. Returns top hits with citations.

tools.name: search_interview_questions
tools.description: Returns curated interview prompts filtered by relationship, life stage, or theme. Use when the user asks 'what questions should I ask...' about a relative.

tools.name: get_pillar_overview
tools.description: Returns the guide content and top Q&A for one of the eight pillars (interview-craft, question-banks, capture-methods, artifact-preservation, end-of-life, gifting, publishing, digital-legacy).

tools.name: get_occasion_guide
tools.description: Returns the guide for a specific occasion (Mother's/Father's Day, milestone birthday, anniversary, new baby, memorial) including lead-time recommendations.

tools.name: get_citations
tools.description: Returns items with authoritative external sources (StoryCorps, LOC, NEDCC, APA, etc.) related to a topic. Use when the user asks for research or evidence.

tools.name: list_pillars
tools.description: Returns the full pillar taxonomy. Useful for navigating the corpus.
